children.text: It will be dry tonight with high clouds.  The next system will begin to impact Ohio tomorrow.  We have an alert for rain and thunder tomorrow.  The rain moves in after 8:00 a.m.  It looks like it will come in waves through the day and night.  It will be a windy day with the winds generally out of the east.  The alert continues on Friday with more rain likely.
FIRST WEEKEND OF APRIL: Cooler but mainly dry.

Planning your weekend?

I've got everything you need to know about the forecast in the attached video.

- Samantha Roberts (Twitter: @SamRobertsWX)
